name: @joytreesite/joytree
description: Joytree CLI — deploy and manage your sites from the terminal

scripts.postpublish: git add package.json && (git commit -m "chore: bump version to $npm_package_version" || true) && (GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 git push origin main || echo 'Note: could not auto-push the version bump to git (no push credentials configured on this machine) — the npm publish itself succeeded. Run git push manually, or see git remote set-url instructions.')
